ol.li: accept4() → OS recycles fd=7 for new client
epoll_ctl(EPOLL_CTL_ADD, fd=7, ...) → EEXIST (fd=7 still in interest set!)

OR: later epoll_ctl(EPOLL_CTL_DEL, fd=7, NULL) removes the NEW connection Why hard to reproduce: Only triggers when OS recycles fd numbers between the skip and the subsequent ADD/DEL — requires high connection churn. Works fine under low load; corrupts state under C10K benchmark. Fix: Always call epoll_ctl(DEL, fd, NULL) before close(fd).
